rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Homily by Dämatewos, bishop of Alexandria
Homily by the archbishop of Antioch
Homily by Yoḥannǝs, Bishop of Ethiopia, who came after Bishop Yǝṣḥaq, on the conflict between the consort of King Arqadewos and John Chysostom
Homily by Yoḥannǝs, Bishop of Aksum on the family of Astäraniqos and Euphemia
Homily by Bishop Yoḥannǝs on the wicked wealthy man whose property was inherited by the son of his poor neighbor
Homily (anonymous) on the book of the angels that came from Jerusalem
Homily (anonymous) on not worshipping other gods
Homily (anonymous) on the need to make the angels sureties by honoring them
Synaxary Entry for Ḫǝdar: Mission to Joshua, son of Nun and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Taḫśaś Mission of the Archangel to rescue the three holy children, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Ṭǝrr Mission of the Archangel to Jacob, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Yäkkatit, Mission of the Archangel to Samson, the giant, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Mäggabit, Mission of the Archangel to Balaam, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Miyazya, Mission of the Archangel to the Prophet Jeremiah, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Gǝnbot, Mission of the Archangel to Habakkuk, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Säne, the building of the church of the Archangel in place of a pagan temple in Alexandria, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Ḥamle, Mission to the camp of Sennacherib, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Näḥase, Mission of the Archangel to the Emperor Constantine, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Mäskäräm, Mission to Prophet Isaiah, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Synaxary Entry for Ṭǝqǝmt, Mission to Prophet Samuel, and Greeting to the Archangel, Sälam
Miracle for the month of Ḫǝdar
Prayer to Jesus Christ, “God, Our Lord, We Beseech You by Your Blood and Flesh,”
Excerpts of a unique Greetings to the Saints, compiled from various sources
